compiler_product_versions: [IMP] Windows Server 2003 SP1 DDK build 4035 count=11

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET HUNTING Suspicious Accept in HTTP POST - Possible Alphacrypt/TeslaCrypt
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET HUNTING Suspicious Accept in HTTP POST - Possible Alphacrypt/TeslaCrypt"; flow:established,to_server; http.method; content:"POST"; http.uri; content:".php"; endswith; http.accept; pcre:"/^(?!m(?:ultipart|essage|odel)|a(?:pplication|udio|ccept)|(?:exampl|imag)e|video|text|\*)/i"; http.header_names; content:"|0d 0a|Accept|0d 0a|"; depth:10; fast_pattern; content:!"Referer"; content:"Accept"; reference:md5,35a6de1e8dbea19bc44cf49ae0cae59e; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:2022502; rev:7; metadata:created_at 2016_02_11, former_category MALWARE, updated_at 2022_05_03;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_category: Malware Command and Control Activity Detected
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET MALWARE Alphacrypt/TeslaCrypt Ransomware CnC Beacon
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET MALWARE Alphacrypt/TeslaCrypt Ransomware CnC Beacon"; flow:established,to_server; http.method; content:"POST"; http.uri; content:".php"; endswith; http.header; content:!"driftmania"; http.user_agent; content:"Mozilla"; depth:7; http.host; content:!"coreftp.com"; http.request_body; content:"data="; depth:5; fast_pattern; pcre:"/^[A-F0-9]{100,}$/R"; http.header_names; content:!"Referer"; reference:md5,a3440b6117f3783989683753c9f394dd; classtype:command-and-control; sid:2022504; rev:8; metadata:affected_product Windows_XP_Vista_7_8_10_Server_32_64_Bit, attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2016_02_11, deployment Perimeter, former_category MALWARE, malware_family Ransomware, malware_family Alphacrypt, malware_family TeslaCrypt, signature_severity Major, tag Ransomware, tag c2, updated_at 2020_09_15, mitre_tactic_id TA0011, mitre_tactic_name Command_And_Control, mitre_technique_id T1041, mitre_technique_name Exfiltration_Over_C2_Channel;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO HTTP POST to WP Theme Directory Without Referer
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET INFO HTTP POST to WP Theme Directory Without Referer"; flow:established,to_server; http.method; content:"POST"; http.uri; content:"/wp-content/themes/"; fast_pattern; pcre:"/^[^&=?]*\/wp-content\/themes\//i"; http.host; content:!"citytv.com"; http.header_names; content:!"Referer"; classtype:bad-unknown; sid:2020822; rev:7; metadata:created_at 2015_03_31, former_category MALWARE, updated_at 2020_08_18;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: SURICATA HTTP unable to match response to request
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http any any -> any any (msg:"SURICATA HTTP unable to match response to request"; flow:established,to_client; app-layer-event:http.unable_to_match_response_to_request; flowint:http.anomaly.count,+,1; classtype:protocol-command-decode; sid:2221010; rev:1;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: TGI HUNT HTTP POST to wp-.* without referer
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http any any -> any any (msg:"TGI HUNT HTTP POST to wp-.* without referer"; flow:established,to_server; content:"POST"; http_method; content:"/wp-"; http_uri; http_header_names; content:!"Referer"; threshold:type limit, track by_src, seconds 60, count 1; classtype:bad-unknown;sid:2610312; rev:1;)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the execution of a Windows system binary that is usually located in the system folder from an uncommon location.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Patrick Bareiss, Anton Kutepov, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: New RUN Key Pointing to Suspicious Folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects suspicious new RUN key element pointing to an executable in a suspicious folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Markus Neis, Sander Wiebing, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Shadow Copies Deletion Using Operating Systems Utilities
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Shadow Copies deletion using operating systems utilities
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Michael Haag, Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community, Andreas Hunkeler (@Karneades)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects remote PowerShell sections by monitoring for wsmprovhost (WinRM host process) as a parent or child process (sign of an active PowerShell remote session).
